title: epic.merge.ready
description: Emitted SOLELY by AutomergePredicate (on epic.watch.end) once the CI watch confirms the Epic→main PR is safe to arm and the disqualification gate passes. The ONLY event AutomergeArmer subscribes to. Story #3367: the Finalizer no longer emits this event — emitting it from finalize cascaded epic.close.end synchronously into the auto-merge arm + branch reap, bypassing the predicate gate and deleting the epic branch before the PR merged.
